DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITION OF DEFENDANT RICHARD HOM IS GRANTED. THE COURT ORDERS THAT THE DURATION OF THE DEPOSITION IS LIMITED TO A MAXIMUM OF FOUR HOURS AND THE SUBJECT MATTER OF THE INQUIRY SHALL BE LIMITED TO THE CIRCUMSTANCES CONCERNING DEFENDANT'S TERMINATION. THE DEPOSITION IS TO BE COMPLETED ON OR BEFORE JANUARY 18, 2005, AT A TIME MUTUALLY CONVENIENT TO THE PARTIES. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
